_meta.source: GradientBoosting per-spot, ERA5-enriched, papa-scaled rain, river flow config
_meta.formula: ntu = interp(swell_table, swell_h, swell_p) x interp(rain_table, effective_rain, dsr) + interp(wind_table, wind_onshore, wind_longshore) + interp(sst_table, sst)
_meta.effective_rain: rain_24h + river_flow_equiv where available. river_flow_equiv = (flow - flow_median) x flow_scale
_meta.papa_scaling: Baked into rain_table. Formula: mult x (1 + papa x log1p(rain/10)). High-papa spots have steeper rain response for extreme events.
_meta.spi_corrections: Aquarium swell table scaled x0.55 (depth 37m vs 20m orbital velocity ratio). SST tables replaced with Gulf-calibrated values (warm=clearer). Wind table onshore negatives zeroed; south wind (negative longshore) bonus preserved.
